DataRequest.Name: Windows: DISM Hyper-V Enable and Disable Correlation / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects a sequence of DISM commands enabling Hyper-V followed by disabling Hyper-V management clients within a short timeframe, which could indicate an attempt to run a virtual instance or evade detection.
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: DISM Hyper-V Enable and Disable Correlation

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: ((((command REGEXP "/limitaccess" AND command REGEXP "/online" AND command REGEXP "enable-feature" AND command REGEXP "microsoft-hyper-v") AND procName REGEXP "\\dism\.exe$") AND command REGEXP " -all|/all") AND ((command REGEXP "/online" AND command REGEXP "disable-feature" AND command REGEXP "microsoft-hyper-v-management-clients") AND procName REGEXP "\\dism\.exe$")) AND eventType="Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process"
